recommendations.title: Turn Cycle Matter into the install template now
recommendations.why: The knowledge layer is finished and the agent has been tested, so the highest-leverage move is capturing the working pat

recommendations.title: Actively ignore low-conviction leads until tomorrow
recommendations.why: The wrong work feels productive while quietly killing momentum.
recommendations.do_now: Leave the 12 weaker leads untouched and re-rank them tomorrow.
recommendations.outcome: Protects focus for the two moves that actually matter today.

recommendations.title: Build inbox intelligence as a gated feed, not a raw mailbox
recommendations.why: For a business companion, inbox noise and full-mailbox exposure are both liabilities. The OS should receive only the ema
recommendations.do_now: Use n8n to classify, filter, and forward lead, supplier, complaint, and urgent owner-review emails i
recommendations.outcome: Safer read-only email visibility with cleaner daily briefings and better escalation control.

inboxes.name: Lead intake lane
inboxes.purpose: Only forward high-fit lead emails, quote requests, and revenue opportunities into the Company B
inboxes.next_action: Define filters for sender, keywords, urgency, and service fit.
inboxes.guardrail: Ignore newsletters, low-fit enquiries, and generic noise.

inboxes.name: Urgent owner review lane
inboxes.purpose: Escalate complaints, incidents, legal/compliance-sensitive messages, and anything that needs ow
inboxes.next_action: Create a priority tag and send these into the CEO/COO topic only.
inboxes.guardrail: Never auto-commit, never auto-send, never claim approval.

inboxes.name: Supplier + ops blockers
inboxes.purpose: Surface operational blockers that affect fulfilment, scheduling, stock, or delivery.
inboxes.next_action: Define which suppliers and operational keywords should trigger a Missi
inboxes.guardrail: Summarise the blocker, do not dump the full inbox into the dashboard.

inboxes.name: Direct mailbox access
inboxes.purpose: Reserved for later only if the business truly needs interactive mailbox search or thread inspec
inboxes.next_action: Keep deferred until the filtered workflow proves insufficient.
inboxes.guardrail: Broader exposure and trust requirement than the n8n-first design.
